# Install Checklist — chaos:archive

Install the Copilot-native artifacts by copying:

```text
.github/prompts/chaos-archive.prompt.md
.github/agents/chaos-archive-orchestrator.agent.md
.github/skills/chaos-archive/SKILL.md
.github/skills/chaos-archive/reference/*.md
.github/skills/chaos-shared/reference/*.md
```

Then run the prompt file in Copilot Agent mode.
